Collected citations will be added to a references.bib file.

result.response_content_preview:
THOUGHT:
Since the citation list is currently empty, I need to establish a foundational reference that directly addresses the core theme of the paper: real-world pitfalls, failures, and challenges in deploying deep learning systems. The most critical starting point is a seminal work that systematically categorizes non-modeling challenges in production ML, which will serve to summarize existing literature (Category 1) and highlight the research gap between controlled academic benchmarks and messy real-world deployment environments (Category 5). "Hidden Technical Debt in Machine Learning Systems" by Sculley et al. is the ideal candidate to anchor this discussion.
